# Gautham Gokulakonda

> Personal portfolio of Gautham Gokulakonda — Senior Software Engineer specializing in Go concurrency, Python/AI systems (LLMs, RAG, agentic workflows, MCP), and high-performance React frontends.

Gautham is based in Hyderabad, India, with 3+ years of experience building scalable web apps, microservices, and AI-powered systems. The site showcases selected work, technical experience, skills, and a CSS experiments lab.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Hero, about, tech stack, experience, selected projects, CSS lab, and contact.

## Optional

- [GitHub](https://github.com/Gautham-2002): Source code and open-source contributions.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/gautham-gokulakonda-a92196231): Career timeline and recommendations.
